2025/26 Season · Gameweek 33

Dallas Premier League

12-team Sleeper EPL dynasty fantasy

Featured Manager · GW33

erozier stumbles — the title race is on

A loss to bjennings28 shrinks the #1-seed buffer with three weeks to play

erozier hit his first real bump of the season in GW33, falling to bjennings28 and watching Noahvillasana17 stay one game back despite also dropping a week. The cushion is still real — 21–12 is the league's best record and 3,166 points for remains the highest-scoring offense by a comfortable margin — but the wire-to-wire coronation story is dead. He now faces Noahvillasana17 in a head-to-head next week that will all but decide the #1 seed. Win it, and the run-in is academic. Lose it, and the race is tied with three weeks to play.
